section.title: WeBWorK Assignments
section.p: Your online homework is in a platform called . You can access from our D2L course. Each week I will assign problem sets and you are required to answer them online using . The topics that we cover on a given day are typically due the following Sunday evening at 10:00pm. You may submit answers any time before the due date.

When you are stumped, you can click the Email Instructor button at the bottom of any problem. Write a message explaining what you have tried and if possible, include the work from your calculations. It allows you to upload files with your message, so you could include a photo of some work you did on paper. will send me an email with helpful information (like all of the incorrect attempts you have tried) and I will get back to you soon with a response. When I respond, it will be via email, so you must remember to check your email.
